frame_analyses.description: Initial view of white gauze material suspended between red clamps with dark circular cutting line marked
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Gauze appears properly secured, circle diameter approximately 4cm with clear markings

frame_analyses.description: Both scissors introduced into field, beginning to approach the marked circle for initial cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument positioning, approaching tangentially to circle

frame_analyses.description: Scissors positioned at lower portion of circle, beginning cutting motion along marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut appears to follow line closely, good coordination between hands

frame_analyses.description: Continuing circumferential cut, approximately 25% of circle completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good alignment with marked line, steady cutting technique

frame_analyses.description: Approximately 50% of circle cut, continuing around upper portion
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Some minor waviness visible in cut line at top portion

frame_analyses.description: Approximately 75% of circle completed, nearing completion of circumference
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut line shows some deviation from marked circle, particularly visible at cardinal points

frame_analyses.description: Adjusting cutting direction to refine areas of previous cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Attempting to correct previous deviations by trimming excess material

frame_analyses.description: Final trimming and completion of circular cut, central disc falling away
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Circle appears complete with central portion detached

frame_analyses.description: Task completion with circular cut accomplished, gauze remains attached to clamps
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result shows complete circle with some deviation from marked line

penalties.description: Cut line deviates from marked circle at multiple cardinal points, estimated 2-4mm deviation at north position
Additional deviation visible at east position of circle, approximately 2mm outside marked line

confidence_rationale: Completion time clearly observable from frame sequence. Deviation measurements estimated from visual inspection but camera angle limits precise measurement at some cardinal points. Gauze integrity well-observed throughout.
cannot_determine: Precise mm measurements at southwest and northwest positions due to camera angle
Exact timing of initial instrument entry - estimated from first instrument visibility
technique_summary: Intermediate to novice performance with prolonged cutting phase (120s) and notable deviations from marked line. Task completed successfully but with precision penalties.
strengths: Good instrument coordination during cutting phases
improvement_suggestions: Reduce cutting time by maintaining steadier cutting pace
Focus on following marked line more precisely, especially at cardinal points
Practice smooth continuous cutting motion to reduce deviation
